projects.name: Line following robot with computer vision and automatic control
projects.description: In this project i develop a line following robot with cascade classifier in OpenCV for process the imageand PID for control the aligning with the line.

projects.name: SimplesCTe
projects.description: The project aims at simple and fast way to the user declare the CTe(CTe is like CMR transport docu-ment for Brazil). This project focus in company’s whose the type oftaxes is simple(simple is a rank oftax in Brazil). In this project i work in back end with go-Lang and in the front end with react-js
